name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-anthropic-messages
description_en: Anthropic-messages protocol bridge for pi. Activates for any anthropic-messages API session (Anthropic OAuth/API-key + proxy providers): canonicalizes lowercase pi core tools (read/write/bash/grep → Read/Write/Bash/Grep), namespaces custom tools under mcp
description_zh: pi 的 Anthropic-messages 协议桥接。为任何 anthropic-messages API 会话激活（Anthropic OAuth/API-key + 代理提供商）：将小写的 pi 核心工具标准化（read/write/bash/grep → Read/Write/Bash/Grep），将自定义工具命名空间置于 mcp 下
